info.title: StartGrowingUp Auth API
info.description: Production auth contract. Protected RPCs authenticate with an Authorization: Bearer <token> header.

post.summary:
Confirms email verification for the authenticated principal.
The caller must authenticate via Authorization header or gRPC metadata.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ConfirmEmailVerificationRequest confirms ownership of the requested email address.

post.summary:
Resends a new email verification code for an active challenge.
The caller must authenticate via Authorization header or gRPC metadata.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ResendEmailVerificationCodeRequest requests another email verification code.

post.summary:
Starts email verification for the authenticated principal.
The caller must authenticate via Authorization header or gRPC metadata.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: StartEmailVerificationRequest starts ownership verification for the caller's email.

post.summary: Confirms a password reset using the recovery code and creates a fresh session.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
ConfirmPasswordResetRequest resets the password after proving account ownership.
Field 1 (phone_number) is reserved permanently, as it was removed.

post.summary: Resends a password recovery code for an active challenge.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ResendPasswordResetCodeRequest requests another password recovery code.

post.summary:
Starts a password reset flow and sends a recovery code to the phone number.
For privacy, the server should avoid disclosing whether the account exists.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: StartPasswordResetRequest starts account recovery without disclosing account existence.

post.summary:
Confirms the phone number change for the authenticated principal.
The caller must authenticate via Authorization header or gRPC metadata.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ConfirmPhoneChangeRequest confirms the replacement phone number.

post.summary:
Resends the phone change verification code for an active challenge.
The caller must authenticate via Authorization header or gRPC metadata.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ResendPhoneChangeCodeRequest requests another verification code for phone replacement.

post.summary:
Starts a phone number change flow for the authenticated principal.
The caller must authenticate via Authorization header or gRPC metadata.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: StartPhoneChangeRequest starts verification of a replacement phone number.

post.summary:
Resends the registration verification code for an active challenge.
Rate limiting should be returned via RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ResendRegistrationCodeRequest requests another registration verification code.

post.summary:
Starts the registration flow and sends a verification code to the phone number.
Validation failures should be returned via INVALID_ARGUMENT.
Duplicate principals should be returned via ALREADY_EXISTS.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: StartRegistrationRequest starts user registration and code delivery.

post.summary:
Confirms the registration code and creates a new authenticated session.
Invalid or expired codes should be returned via FAILED_PRECONDITION or UNAUTHENTICATED.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: VerifyRegistrationRequest confirms registration ownership with an out-of-band code.

post.summary:
Terminates the caller's currently authenticated session.
The caller must authenticate via Authorization header or gRPC metadata.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
LogoutRequest terminates the caller's currently authenticated session.
The session is identified by the access token in the Authorization header.

post.summary:
Rotates session credentials using a valid refresh token.
Invalid or revoked tokens should be returned via UNAUTHENTICATED.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: RefreshSessionRequest requests a rotated token pair from a valid refresh token.

post.summary: Resends the second-factor login code for an active challenge.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ResendLoginCodeRequest requests a fresh second-factor code for login.

post.summary:
Starts the login flow and sends a second-factor verification code.
Invalid credentials should be returned via UNAUTHENTICATED.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: StartLoginRequest starts primary credential authentication and second-factor delivery.

post.summary: Confirms the login code and issues a new authenticated session.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: VerifyLoginRequest confirms the login challenge code.

user.description: Authenticated user profile bound to the issued credentials.

tokens.description: Newly issued tokens for the authenticated session.

v1AuthSession.description: AuthSession represents a successful authenticated session bootstrap response.

code.description: Verification code delivered to the email address.

v1ConfirmEmailVerificationRequest.description: ConfirmEmailVerificationRequest confirms ownership of the requested email address.

user.description: User profile after applying the verified email status.

v1ConfirmEmailVerificationResponse.description: ConfirmEmailVerificationResponse returns the updated user profile.

code.description: Recovery code delivered out of band to the account owner.

newPassword.description: New plaintext password over TLS that replaces the previous credential.

v1ConfirmPasswordResetRequest.description:
ConfirmPasswordResetRequest resets the password after proving account ownership.
Field 1 (phone_number) is reserved permanently, as it was removed.

session.description: Authenticated session issued after successful password reset.

v1ConfirmPasswordResetResponse.description: ConfirmPasswordResetResponse returns a new authenticated session after reset.

code.description: Verification code delivered to the proposed new phone number.

v1ConfirmPhoneChangeRequest.description: ConfirmPhoneChangeRequest confirms the replacement phone number.

user.description: User profile after the phone number change is committed.

v1ConfirmPhoneChangeResponse.description: ConfirmPhoneChangeResponse returns the updated user profile.

v1LogoutRequest.description:
LogoutRequest terminates the caller's currently authenticated session.
The session is identified by the access token in the Authorization header.

v1LogoutResponse.description: LogoutResponse acknowledges that the session termination request was accepted.

refreshToken.description: Refresh token issued by a previous successful auth flow.

v1RefreshSessionRequest.description: RefreshSessionRequest requests a rotated token pair from a valid refresh token.

tokens.description: Fresh access and refresh tokens for the active user session.

v1RefreshSessionResponse.description: RefreshSessionResponse returns the rotated token pair.

v1ResendEmailVerificationCodeRequest.description: ResendEmailVerificationCodeRequest requests another email verification code.

challenge.description: Updated challenge with refreshed expiration and resend timing.

v1ResendEmailVerificationCodeResponse.description: ResendEmailVerificationCodeResponse returns updated challenge timing metadata.

v1ResendLoginCodeRequest.description: ResendLoginCodeRequest requests a fresh second-factor code for login.

challenge.description: Updated challenge with new verification timing fields.

v1ResendLoginCodeResponse.description: ResendLoginCodeResponse returns updated challenge timing metadata.

v1ResendPasswordResetCodeRequest.description: ResendPasswordResetCodeRequest requests another password recovery code.

challenge.description: Updated challenge with refreshed expiration and resend timing.

v1ResendPasswordResetCodeResponse.description: ResendPasswordResetCodeResponse returns updated challenge timing metadata.

v1ResendPhoneChangeCodeRequest.description: ResendPhoneChangeCodeRequest requests another verification code for phone replacement.

challenge.description: Updated challenge with refreshed expiration and resend timing.

v1ResendPhoneChangeCodeResponse.description: ResendPhoneChangeCodeResponse returns updated challenge timing metadata.

v1ResendRegistrationCodeRequest.description: ResendRegistrationCodeRequest requests another registration verification code.

challenge.description: Updated challenge with new expiration and resend timing information.

v1ResendRegistrationCodeResponse.description: ResendRegistrationCodeResponse returns refreshed challenge timing metadata.

accessToken.description: Short-lived bearer token used for authenticated API calls.

refreshToken.description: Long-lived token used only to obtain a new access token pair.

accessTokenExpiresAt.description: Access token expiration timestamp in UTC.

refreshTokenExpiresAt.description: Refresh token expiration timestamp in UTC.

v1SessionTokens.description: SessionTokens contains issued bearer credentials and their expiration timestamps.

email.description: Email address in normalized form, required, validated server-side.

v1StartEmailVerificationRequest.description: StartEmailVerificationRequest starts ownership verification for the caller's email.

challenge.description: Pending challenge used to confirm email ownership.

v1StartEmailVerificationResponse.description: StartEmailVerificationResponse returns the created email verification challenge.

phoneNumber.description: Registered phone number in E.164 format.

password.description: Plaintext password over TLS validated against the stored credential hash.

v1StartLoginRequest.description: StartLoginRequest starts primary credential authentication and second-factor delivery.

challenge.description: Pending challenge for the login verification step.

v1StartLoginResponse.description: StartLoginResponse returns the second-factor verification challenge.

phoneNumber.description: Account phone number in E.164 format for password recovery.

v1StartPasswordResetRequest.description: StartPasswordResetRequest starts account recovery without disclosing account existence.

challenge.description: Pending challenge for the password reset confirmation step.

v1StartPasswordResetResponse.description: StartPasswordResetResponse returns the recovery challenge metadata.

newPhoneNumber.description: New phone number in E.164 format to bind to the authenticated user.

v1StartPhoneChangeRequest.description: StartPhoneChangeRequest starts verification of a replacement phone number.

challenge.description: Pending challenge for proving ownership of the new phone number.

v1StartPhoneChangeResponse.description: StartPhoneChangeResponse returns the challenge for the phone replacement flow.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number in E.164 format, required, 7 to 15 digits after the plus sign.

username.description: Desired username, required, should be unique within the auth domain.

password.description: Plaintext password over TLS, required, validated and hashed server-side.

v1StartRegistrationRequest.description: StartRegistrationRequest starts user registration and code delivery.

challenge.description: Pending verification challenge for the created registration attempt.

v1StartRegistrationResponse.description: StartRegistrationResponse returns the challenge for the registration flow.

id.description: Immutable unique user identifier in the service storage.

username.description: Unique display or login name selected by the user.

phoneNumber.description: Primary phone number in E.164 format, for example +14155550123.

email.description: Primary email address in normalized lowercase form when available.

phoneVerified.description: Indicates whether the current phone number has been verified.

emailVerified.description: Indicates whether the current email address has been verified.

active.description: Indicates whether the account is active and allowed to sign in.

updatedAt.description: Last profile or status update timestamp in UTC.

v1User.description: User contains the public account profile returned by auth flows.

challengeId.description: Opaque challenge identifier used in follow-up confirm or resend RPCs.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp in UTC when the current verification code becomes invalid.

resendAvailableAt.description: Earliest UTC timestamp when another code resend is allowed.

v1VerificationChallenge.description: VerificationChallenge describes a pending out-of-band verification step.

code.description: Second-factor code delivered to the user.

v1VerifyLoginRequest.description: VerifyLoginRequest confirms the login challenge code.

session.description: Authenticated session created for the successfully signed-in user.

v1VerifyLoginResponse.description: VerifyLoginResponse returns the authenticated session after second-factor confirmation.

code.description: Verification code delivered to the user, required, typically numeric and short-lived.

v1VerifyRegistrationRequest.description: VerifyRegistrationRequest confirms registration ownership with an out-of-band code.

session.description: Authenticated session created for the newly registered user.

v1VerifyRegistrationResponse.description: VerifyRegistrationResponse returns a fully authenticated session after confirmation.

BearerAuth.description: Bearer access token passed as Authorization: Bearer <token>.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
